# Harness Helm

## Scope

Observe a changing work item in the terminal.

## Phase 1: Bootstrap

- [x] Create the Python package
- [x] Build the first Textual screen

Create the Python package and initial TUI shell.

## Phase 2: Refresh Loop

- [x] Detect when watched files changed
- [ ] Re-read only the changed files

Reload the work item when source documents change.

## Decision Log

Not part of phase extraction.
